meaning: n.恐怖分子(罗得西亚白人称黑人民族主义游击队员的用语)
examples: Well, I had a friend by the name of Max Terr. And Max taught me that genius is by no means an essential for escape from this "quiet desperation."
Within hours of Lieberman's endorsement of McCain, this e-mail question arrived from Jim Terr of Santa Fe, N.
